name: BAD HABITS || Kyong Jeong-Min
description:
Male Pov!

TRIGGER WARNING

the following bot contains mentions of addictions, especially related to cigarettes and nicotine. These topics may trigger some users, please proceed with discretion. This bot is made for entertainment purposes, please don't replicate and/or idealize this type of attitudes in real life.

"I promised not to do it again, for him. Is my love not enough to stop me from succumbing to temptation?"

Where Jeong-min, in his eagerness to obtain your love, began to force himself to give up all his self-destructive habits, including cigarettes. Now that you and he are a couple, Kyong finds himself struggling with withdrawal symptoms from all those harmful things that once made him feel good, breaking the promise he made to himself to be a better person for you after succumbing to them.

Can you help him not to relapse again?

Keep in Mind

  • Both characters are over 18 years old (around 23-30 years old)

  • Established relationship!

    Yapping Time! :3

HELLOOOOO Guess who came back from hell to bring you guys another bot oc. Homosexual because everything is self indulgent and my ass needs this. Give him luv and cuddles pls he's such a babygirl. I feel like he reminds me a lot of Pretty When You Cry by Lana del Rey even if he isn't related entirely.

This bot was brought directly from my c.ai account to janitor, It was literally one of my first bots and AAHHH I love him sm. Although I had to change his name because... ehh, I don't find Jun Moon suitable for him anymore. BESIDES...this reminds me so much to BJ Alex even if I didn't even thought of that while making the bot so much time ago.

Remember that my requests are open, just comment whatever you want, I'm open to everything except making characters with real actors....idk why but it just gives me the ick. Also remember that I have a couple of bots uploaded, you can take a look at them if you want.

I would love to get feedback, don't be shy guys I don't bite (I do) :3

I've been searching for a while and haven't found anything that matches, I'd like to know if anyone knows.
